stemHtml: In level flight in a light aircraft, the pilot suspects that the static pressure feed is blocked and selects the alternate static source which is located inside the aircraft cabin. What would be the effect on the VSI?

options.a: The rate of climb indication will jump upwards slightly then return to zero.
options.b: The VSI will indicate a sustained small rate of descent.
options.c: The VSI will indicate a sustained small rate of climb.
